member.name: P:LyricsScraperNET.Configuration.ILyricScraperClientConfig.IsEnabled
member.summary: Check if any external provider options is enabled

member.name: T:LyricsScraperNET.Helpers.Ensure
member.summary: Check input parameters

member.name: M:LyricsScraperNET.Helpers.Ensure.ArgumentNotNull(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Checks an argument if it isn't null.

member.name: M:LyricsScraperNET.Helpers.Ensure.ArgumentNotNullOrEmptyString(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Checks an argument if it isn't null or an empty string

member.name: M:LyricsScraperNET.Helpers.Ensure.ArgumentNotNullOrEmptyList``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.String)
member.summary: Checks an argument list if it isn't null or an empty string

member.name: P:LyricsScraperNET.ILyricsScraperClient.IsEnabled
member.summary: Checking that there is some enabled external provider available for search.

member.name: M:LyricsScraperNET.ILyricsScraperClient.SearchLyric(LyricsScraperNET.Models.Requests.SearchRequest)
member.summary: Search lyric by different search requests: 1) Search by Uri: 2) Search by Artist and Song name:

member.name: M:LyricsScraperNET.ILyricsScraperClient.SearchLyricAsync(LyricsScraperNET.Models.Requests.SearchRequest)
member.summary: Async search lyric by different search requests: 1) Search by Uri: 2) Search by Artist and Song name:

member.name: M:LyricsScraperNET.ILyricsScraperClient.AddProvider(LyricsScraperNET.Providers.Abstract.IExternalProvider)
member.summary: Adding a new external provider that will be used to search for lyrics.

member.name: M:LyricsScraperNET.ILyricsScraperClient.RemoveProvider(LyricsScraperNET.Providers.Models.ExternalProviderType)
member.summary: Removing an external provider by from the list of search providers.

member.name: M:LyricsScraperNET.ILyricsScraperClient.Enable
member.summary: Enable lyrics search. All external providers will be enabled in this case.

member.name: M:LyricsScraperNET.ILyricsScraperClient.Disable
member.summary: Disable lyrics search. All external providers will be enabled in this case. Calling the lyrics search method will return an empty result.

member.name: M:LyricsScraperNET.ILyricsScraperClient.WithLogger(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Creates a new ILogger instance from . Can be useful for error analysis if the lyric text is not found.

member.name: T:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Requests.ArtistAndSongSearchRequest
member.summary: Query model for searching lyrics by artist/band name and song/track title.

member.name: P:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Requests.ArtistAndSongSearchRequest.Artist
member.summary: Artist or band name.

member.name: P:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Requests.ArtistAndSongSearchRequest.Song
member.summary: Song or track title.

member.name: P:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Requests.ArtistAndSongSearchRequest.Provider
member.summary: The type of external provider for which lyrics will be searched. By default, it is set to - the search will be performed across all available client providers.

member.name: T:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Requests.UriSearchRequest
member.summary: Query model for searching lyrics by the web address where the lyrics of one of the supported providers are located.

member.name: P:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Requests.UriSearchRequest.Uri
member.summary: The web address where the lyrics of one of the supported providers are located.

member.name: P:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Requests.UriSearchRequest.Provider
member.summary: The type of external provider for which lyrics will be searched. By default, it is set to - the search will be performed across all available client providers.

member.name: T:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Responses.ResponseStatusCode
member.summary: Search response status code list.

member.name: F:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Responses.ResponseStatusCode.None
member.summary: Not specified status code.

member.name: F:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Responses.ResponseStatusCode.Error
member.summary: An error occurred during the search.

member.name: F:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Responses.ResponseStatusCode.Success
member.summary: The lyrics was found in one of the available providers.

member.name: F:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Responses.ResponseStatusCode.NoDataFound
member.summary: The lyrics could not be found in one of the available providers.

member.name: F:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Responses.ResponseStatusCode.BadRequest
member.summary: The search request is incorrect or contains malformed data.

member.name: T:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Responses.SearchResult
member.summary: Lyrics search result model.

member.name: P:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Responses.SearchResult.LyricText
member.summary: The text of the found lyrics. If the lyrics could not be found, an empty value is returned.

member.name: P:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Responses.SearchResult.ExternalProviderType
member.summary: The type of external provider for which the lyrics were found.

member.name: P:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Responses.SearchResult.ResponseStatusCode
member.summary: Search result status code.

member.name: P:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Responses.SearchResult.ResponseMessage
member.summary: A message that may contain additional information in case of problems with the search.

member.name: P:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Responses.SearchResult.Instrumental
member.summary: The flag indicates that the search results are for music only, without text.

member.name: M:LyricsScraperNET.Models.Responses.SearchResult.IsEmpty
member.summary: Returns true if the field is empty.

member.name: P:LyricsScraperNET.Providers.Abstract.IExternalProvider.SearchPriority
member.summary: If there are multiple external providers, then the search will start from the provider with the highest priority.

member.name: P:LyricsScraperNET.Providers.Abstract.IExternalProviderOptions.SearchPriority
member.summary: If there are multiple external providers, then the search will start from the provider with the highest priority.

member.name: F:LyricsScraperNET.Providers.LyricFind.LyricFindProvider._lyricStart
member.summary: Field name in json format that contains lyric text.

member.name: M:LyricsScraperNET.Providers.LyricFind.LyricFindProvider.IsInstumentalLyric(System.String)
member.summary: Check if lyric text contains instrumental flag.

member.name: M:LyricsScraperNET.Providers.LyricFind.LyricFindProvider.TryReturnBooleanFieldValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Try to find and return the fielad value as boolean. Pattern: [:true(or false)]. In case if fieldName is not found returns false.

member.name: F:LyricsScraperNET.Providers.SongLyrics.SongLyricsProvider.InstrumentalLyricText
member.summary: For instrumental songs, the text "[Instrumental]" is returned in the songLyricsDiv
